title: WATCH:  Trump pushes back on notion that Israel forced US' hand to attack Iran
fullText: Trump pushes back on notion that Israel forced US' hand to attack IranPresident Donald Trump pushed back on the idea that Israel forced the Trump administration's hand to attack Iran, telling ABC News that Iran was "going to attack if we didn't do it."March 3, 2026
summary: President Donald Trump pushed back on the idea that Israel forced the Trump administration's hand to attack Iran, telling ABC News that Iran was "going to attack if we didn't do it."
